title: Harra, Jim - First Permanent Secretary and Chief Executive, HM Revenue and Customs - ACOBA Advice
body: "Sir Jim Harra KCB left his role as First Permanent Secretary and Chief Executive in April 2025.  Vice-Chair of the Board of Trustees, Royal National Institute of Blind People  Sir Jim Harra KCB sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the Royal National Institute of Blind People. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in April 2025; and the appointment was announced in May 2025 (to be taken up in July 2025). An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
